images.title: Veil Nebula
images.subtitle: Supernova remnant sweep
images.summary: Local static dataset for iterating on image selection, overlays, and region details.

parts.name: Western Arc
parts.focus: High-contrast filament band with bright cyan edges.
parts.details: Useful for testing labels and highlight states on a brighter section of the image.

parts.name: Core Knots
parts.focus: Dense cluster of brighter ribbons in the center of the frame.
parts.details: A good stand-in for future region metadata such as notes, links, and measurements.

parts.name: Outer Field
parts.focus: Dimmer edge region with more empty space around the subject.
parts.details: Useful for checking legibility and navigation when the selected area is less visually busy.

images.title: Eagle Nebula
images.subtitle: Pillars and dust structures
images.summary: Small local app slice with real assets in-repo and named regions for the sidebar and overlay.

parts.name: Pillar Band
parts.focus: Tall dust structures with strong warm highlights.
parts.details: Useful for validating how the UI behaves when multiple adjacent hotspots are close together.

parts.name: Ridge Line
parts.focus: Bright transition where the scene moves from dust to glow.
parts.details: A good test case for descriptive copy and future annotation metadata.

parts.name: Star Field
parts.focus: Sparser region with brighter isolated stars.
parts.details: This gives the UI a lighter-weight region to contrast with the denser structures.

images.title: Andromeda Galaxy
images.subtitle: Wide-frame spiral structure
images.summary: A straightforward local browser for trying image-first navigation before cluster integration.

parts.name: Core Glow
parts.focus: Bright central region with a softer radial falloff.
parts.details: Acts as the most obvious target in the image and a good default selected region.

parts.name: Dust Lanes
parts.focus: Dark bands crossing the brighter disk.
parts.details: Useful for future overlay work where region outlines matter more than a single point.

parts.name: Outer Halo
parts.focus: Low-signal edge where the galaxy fades into background space.
parts.details: Good for testing low-contrast regions and secondary descriptive copy.
